name: WLF_LI_CONTENT_F
description: Web playable information about a learning item content object.

columns.Name: CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: CONTENT_ID

columns.Name: EFFORT_CALCULATION_RULE
columns.Comments: Actual effort calculation rule

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: CONTENT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Content number

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: CONTENT_ID

columns.Name: TRACKING_TYPE
columns.Comments: TRACKING_TYPE

columns.Name: UUID
columns.Comments: UUID

columns.Name: LOCATION
columns.Comments: Information about location of the content object.

columns.Name: THUMBNAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Thumbnail associated with the content object.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_ID
columns.Comments: The id of the source/originator of the content (e.g. person, learning item, external provider, etc.)

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: The persona of the source which has created the content

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of the content

columns.Name: CONTENT_FORMAT
columns.Comments: Format of the content

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Current status of the content object {ACTIVE, DELETED}.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: Content RICH_MEDIA_OBJECT_ID

columns.Name: AUTHOR
columns.Comments: AUTHOR

columns.Name: KEYWORDS
columns.Comments: KEYWORDS

columns.Name: VERSION
columns.Comments: VERSION

columns.Name: PRICE
columns.Comments: PRICE

columns.Name: EFFORT_IN_SECONDS
columns.Comments: Effort required in seconds for the associated content

columns.Name: CURRENCY
columns.Comments: CURRENCY

columns.Name: IS_COPYRIGHTED
columns.Comments: IS_COPYRIGHTED

columns.Name: IS_AUTO_COMMIT
columns.Comments: IS_AUTO_COMMIT

columns.Name: COPYRIGHT_TEXT
columns.Comments: COPYRIGHT_TEXT

columns.Name: IS_VISIBLE
columns.Comments: IS_VISIBLE

columns.Name: STARTING_URL
columns.Comments: STARTING_URL

columns.Name: MASTERY_SCORE
columns.Comments: MASTERY_SCORE

columns.Name: SOURCE_PASSING_SCORE
columns.Comments: Mastery Score as defined by Metadata

columns.Name: SOURCE_MINIMUM_SCORE
columns.Comments: The minimum score is the lowest a learner can get on the DL item.

columns.Name: SOURCE_MAXIMUM_SCORE
columns.Comments: The maximum score is the highest a learner can get on the DL item.

columns.Name: COMPLETION_THRESHOLD
columns.Comments: This is a SCORM 2004 completion mastery score.  For SCORM 2004, mastery_score is the scaled passing score (objective_mastery_score)

columns.Name: LAUNCH_DATA
columns.Comments: LAUNCH_DATA

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_METHOD
columns.Comments: LAST_UPDATE_METHOD

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: EXTERNAL_IDENTIFIER

columns.Name: CATALOG
columns.Comments: CATALOG

columns.Name: CATALOG_NUMBER
columns.Comments: CATALOG_NUMBER

columns.Name: TIME_LIMIT_ACTION
columns.Comments: TIME_LIMIT_ACTION

columns.Name: PLAYABLE_ITEMS_COUNT
columns.Comments: PLAYABLE_ITEMS_COUNT

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: INGESTION_NAME
columns.Comments: INGESTION_NAME

columns.Name: INGESTION_STATUS
columns.Comments: INGESTION_STATUS

columns.Name: INGESTION_STATUS_LOG
columns.Comments: INGESTION_STATUS_LOG

columns.Name: COMPLETION_ON_OPEN
columns.Comments: Indicates whether content should be marked complete upon open.

columns.Name: RELATED_CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores related content id, ie questionnaire id

columns.Name: SELF_CHECKLIST_CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores self assessment checklist questionnaire id

columns.Name: RELATED_CONTENT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Related content id version number

columns.Name: TIME_LIMIT
columns.Comments: Stores time limit to complete content

columns.Name: TIME_LIMIT_UOM
columns.Comments: Time limit unit of measure

columns.Name: MAX_ATTEMPTS
columns.Comments: Max attempts to retry content ie assessments

columns.Name: HIDE_SCORE_LEARNER
columns.Comments: Hide passing score for learners

columns.Name: HIDE_SCORE_ADMIN
columns.Comments: Hide passing score for admins

columns.Name: DISABLE_REVIEW
columns.Comments: Disable view again of completed content. Y to disable.

columns.Name: HIDE_CORRECT_ANSWERS
columns.Comments: Hide correct answers in feedback for successfully completed assessments

columns.Name: RECORDED_ATTEMPT_REVIEW
columns.Comments: Recorded Attempt Review

columns.Name: RECORDED_ATTEMPTS
columns.Comments: Recorded Attempts

columns.Name: ENABLE_SELF_ASSESS_CHECKLIST
columns.Comments: Value to represent if learner self asses checklist to be taken before observer checklist

columns.Name: OBSRVR_USE_CHKLIST_SCORING
columns.Comments: Value represents to use check-list scoring instead of manual pass / fail

columns.Name: OBSRVR_HIDE_SCORE_LEARNER
columns.Comments: Hide observer given score of passing for learners

columns.Name: OBSRVR_HIDE_SCORE_ADMIN
columns.Comments: Hide observer given score of passing for Admin

columns.Name: OBSRVR_HIDE_CORRECT_ANSWERS
columns.Comments: Observer Hide correct answers in feedback for successfully completed assessments

columns.Name: OBSRVR_RECORDED_ATTEMPTS
columns.Comments: Observer recorded attempts type.

columns.Name: OBSRVR_RECORDED_ATTEMPT_REVIEW
columns.Comments: Represents observer setting for recorded attempt review

columns.Name: OBSRVR_MAX_ATTEMPTS
columns.Comments: Observer max attempts to retry checklist.

columns.Name: OBSRVR_DISABLE_REVIEW
columns.Comments: Observer setting to disable view again of completed content. Y to disable.

columns.Name: OBSERVER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores lookup code representing type of observer

columns.Name: ROUTING_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores lookup-code to represent the actual type of observer chosen. ie., type of Representative or Manager Hierarchy

columns.Name: HIERARCHY_LEVELS
columns.Comments: Stores hierarchy levels for the routing type selected.

columns.Name: DISABLE_REASSIGN_CHECKLIST
columns.Comments: Column to maintain flag to allow  reassign checklist to others. Value Y  when un-checked.

columns.Name: ALLOW_REASSIGN_CHECKLIST
columns.Comments: Allow reassign checklist

columns.Name: ALLOW_BROWSE_CONTENT
columns.Comments: This column represents "Learners to browse content after completing activity" is allowed or not.

columns.Name: STORAGE_PROVIDER_ID
columns.Comments: Storage Provider account ID of content

columns.Name: DELIVERY_PROVIDER_ID
columns.Comments: Delivery Provider account ID of content

columns.Name: IS_EMBEDDABLE
columns.Comments: Indicates if this content can be embeddable in a iframe or not

columns.Name: SCORED_CONTENT_COMPLETION
columns.Comments: Strategy to determine lesson completion status of a scored content

columns.Name: LRNR_ATTEMPT_REVIEW_CONDITION
columns.Comments: Indicates when attempts can be reviewed

columns.Name: ALLOW_FWD_SCRUB
columns.Comments: Allow forward scrub

columns.Name: COMPLETION_PERCENTAGE
columns.Comments: Percentage of video that a learner must watch to get credit for completion

columns.Name: SHOW_FEEDBACK_TO_LEARNER
columns.Comments: Should learner be able to view questionnaire feedback ?

columns.Name: TIME_LIMIT_IN_SECONDS
columns.Comments: If the content is timed, what is the limit

columns.Name: DISPLAY_MODE
columns.Comments: Display mode

columns.Name: ENABLE_SCORING
columns.Comments: Should this content be scored ?

columns.Name: COMPLETION_RULE
columns.Comments: Completion rule

columns.Name: SCORE_VIEW_RULE
columns.Comments: Score View Rule

columns.Name: SHOW_ACTUAL_SCORE_TO_LEARNER
columns.Comments: Should the learner see the score ?

columns.Name: SHOW_ACTUAL_SCORE_TO_ADMIN
columns.Comments: Should the admin see the score ?

columns.Name: COMPLETION_AFFIRMATION
columns.Comments: Indicate how completions are affirmed

columns.Name: OBSRVR_ATMPT_REVIEW_COND_LRNR
columns.Comments: Indicates condition when observer attempts can be reviewed by learner.

columns.Name: OBSRVR_SHOW_FEEDBACK_TO_LRNR
columns.Comments: Flag that represents if learner can view observer feedback

columns.Name: OBSRVR_ALLOW_BROWSE_CONDITION
columns.Comments: This column represents "Observers to browse content after completing activity" is allowed or not.

columns.Name: RETRY_DELAY_IN_SECONDS
columns.Comments: The number of seconds delay before which the content can be retried by the learner

columns.Name: RETRY_ATTEMPTS_BEFORE_DELAY
columns.Comments: Number of attempt retried before delay

columns.Name: AUTO_LAUNCH_ON_PAGE_OPEN
columns.Comments: Indicates if the content needs to be auto launched when the enrollment page opens.

columns.Name: ENABLE_COMPL_BEFORE_EXITAU
columns.Comments: Enable completion before Finish Signal

columns.Name: MOVE_ON
columns.Comments: Describes the Move on criteria for a CMI5 AU

columns.Name: ENTITLEMENT_KEY
columns.Comments: Describes the EntitlementKey value defined for an AU in a CMI5 content

columns.Name: LAUNCH_METHOD
columns.Comments: Describes the launch method defined for an AU in a CMI5 content

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Describes the ActivityType value defines for an AU in a CMI5 content
